amiibo.wave: Super Mario Wave 8: Super Mario Galaxy

functionality.effect: Change to character-themed decoration in Bellabel Park hub (Switch 2 Edition only) | Receive a particular power-up depending on the amiibo
Receive a Life Mushroom or an 1-Up Mushroom
Receive a Life Mushroom or an 1-Up Mushroom
Battle and train up a computer-controlled Figure Player of the character (Read+Write)
Mushrooms you find will be health-restoring Super Mushrooms instead of Poison Mushrooms
Receive a stamp and equipment for the main quest
Unlock a character-themed Mii racing suit
Give Kirby a Copy ability based on the character's abilities and a health item
Unlock character cards to help you in battle (Read+Write)
